productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Solid Black Track Pants
description: Composition Black tracks made of 100% nylon, has a comfortable waist with broad loops and a twill tape buckled belt, zipper fly and press button closure, pockets on the sides with zippered pockets below them, zippered pocket on the right back, zippered seam from the knee to the ankle with press buttons on the hems, and heat transferred logo on the left thigh pocketFitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 30 degrees Do not soak or bleach Do not tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/trims/logo Off on a forest trek filled with waterfalls? There's no better track pant you can vouch for than this one from adidas. The zippered seams from the knee to the ankle allow you to roll up the legs and secure them with the press button closures when in the water, while the nylon fabric dries quickly, keeping you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with muscle Fit short t-shirts and sneakers.Model statistics The model wears trackpants of length 41.5"Height-6.1", Waist-31"
